runTitle: Vercel Playwright broad QA - core routes, dashboard, AI workspace recheck
coveredSurfaces: server detail modal open + 3-tab switch + close
AI starter prompt send + streaming answer

expertAssessments.rationale: 대표 AI surface(sidebar/fullscreen)와 실제 응답 경로를 production에서 재검증했습니다.
핵심 route는 동작하지만 fullscreen AI workspace에서 dashboard로 복귀할 때 worker termination fallback console error가 남아 있습니다.
expertAssessments.nextAction: AI workspace -> dashboard 복귀 시 Web Worker lifecycle를 점검하고 production console cleanliness를 broad baseline 수준으로 복구

expertAssessments.rationale: Playwright MCP로 broad route, modal, AI workspace 흐름을 실제 브라우저에서 검증했습니다.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage --format json --non-interactive succeeded; current billing period effective usage was 14.3807 USD while billed amount stayed 0.0000 USD, with no unexpected spend spike.

pendingImprovements.title: Dashboard logs Web Worker fallback error after returning from fullscreen AI workspace
pendingImprovements.note: Production broad QA reproduced `Worker terminated` -> `Worker 계산 실패, Fallback 사용` console error while navigating `/dashboard/ai-assistant` back to `/dashboard`. UI recovered via fallback, but production console cleanliness regressed on a core route handoff.

notes: Deployment id was captured via `vercel inspect https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app`.
environment.commitSha is inferred from the production deployment creation time (2026-04-21 10:26:21 KST) and the nearest release commit `538282c1c` (`chore(release): 8.11.25`).
404 route emitted the expected failed-resource console entry for the synthetic missing path; this was not treated as the run blocker.
Broad route/AI surface remained functionally green, but console cleanliness regressed on fullscreen AI workspace return to dashboard.
